appraisal_events.evidence: Ma la grand-mère fut enchantée de baron de Charlus… elle parlait de l'oncle de Robert de Saint-Loup avec… bienveillance… et… lui avait si aisément pardonné son préjugé aristocratique.
appraisal_events.explanation: The grandmother expresses warm, benevolent approval of Charlus, excusing his aristocratic prejudice because she discerns in him high intelligence and sensitivity.

status_effects.explanation: Locally elevated by the grandmother’s explicit admiration and indulgent forgiveness of his prejudice.
